title: Secure cloud access, built for startups moving fast
description: Apono eliminates standing privileges across your AWS environment with just-in-time access, automated approvals, and full audit trails - purpose-built for startups that move fast but can't afford security gaps. Apono for Startups provides eligible AWS startup customers with exclusive benefits:
eligibility: AWS Activate members who meet the offer's current provider, account, and regional requirements.
value: Secure cloud access, built for startups moving fast
